issues.title: Lock acquisition is still race-prone
issues.description: The lock flow performs a read/check before writing with replace semantics, so two orchestrators can both acquire the lock under contention.
issues.fix_instruction: Implement true atomic lock creation and keep stale-lock recovery separate from fresh acquisition.

issues.title: review.json parsing does not match the runtime spec
issues.description: The parser expects nested metadata, while the spec defines review metadata at the top level; spec-compliant review artifacts therefore fail validation.
issues.fix_instruction: Make review parsing and validation accept the top-level review envelope defined in the spec and align the tests with that shape.

issues.title: Artifact freshness checks are incomplete
issues.description: Validation ignores phase_attempt and input_fingerprint, so stale artifacts from an earlier retry or old input set can still be accepted.
issues.fix_instruction: Validate phase_attempt and compare artifact input fingerprints against workflow_state.current_inputs for every relevant artifact.

issues.title: Transition dry-run ignores blocked implementation results
issues.description: The CLI never reads implementation_report.result, so blocked implementations can be presented as ready for review.
issues.fix_instruction: Parse implementation report metadata in the CLI path and pass the real result into transition resolution.

issues.title: Redesign-triggering review failures incorrectly increment iteration
issues.description: Routing from review failure to designing currently increments the iteration counter, which distorts audit history and loop-guard accounting.
issues.fix_instruction: Keep the same iteration when review fails and requires redesign unless a separate redesign increment rule is introduced later.
